id.description: Unique identifier for the status effect.

category.description: Determines how the engine processes the effect.

duration.description: Number of turns the effect lasts.

stacking.description: How the effect behaves when reapplied.

element.description: Elemental identity of the status effect.

magnitude.description: Optional numeric value used for DOT/HOT or scaling effects.

stat_modifiers.description: Optional stat changes applied by the effect.

effect.description: Engine-recognized keyword for special behavior (e.g., cleanse, immobilize, nullify).
